topic: Ford hired AI and sacked humans. It backfired badly
headline: AI's Hiring Fail: Human Cost
caption: As a full stack engineer, I find this story a stark reminder that AI isn't a one-size-fits-all solution. Automating hiring processes may seem efficient, but ignoring the human element often leads to unintended consequences. It's important to balance automation with emotional intelligence and context, especially in decision-making roles. Rushing to cut costs with AI can result in serious setbacks, as seen here. Thoughtful integration of AI tools is key to avoiding costly backfires. Stay humble and keep the human touch alive in tech. 🤖 #AI #AutomationFails #SoftwareEngineering #HumanFirst
